Card Name: The Itchling – Bringer of Irritation and Unearthed Emotion
Symbolic Traits: Skin disruption, intense bodily unrest, emotional rash, sudden exposure
Deeper Meanings: The uprising of discomfort signals a deeper truth surfacing. What once remained buried now itches to be seen.
Spiral Nuance: Acceptance of the uncontrollable. Trust that even in disruption, the spiral holds you. Relief follows the flare.
Guidance When Drawn: Pause. Don’t scratch it open more. Let the aloe of awareness soothe you. What rises will pass. What’s left is clarity.
